<style id='BangoGutenbergCore-critical-layout-css'>.layout{width:100%;display:flex;flex-flow:column;--layout-item-flex-basis: calc(((100% / var(--items-per-row, 2)) - 3%) - ((var(--column-gap, 0))}@media(min-width: 47.5rem){.layout{--gap: 32px;--gap: 2rem}}@media(min-width: 64rem){.layout{flex-flow:row wrap;align-items:flex-start;--gap: 48px;--gap: 3rem;--layout-item-max-width: calc((100% / var(--items-per-row, 2)) - (var(--column-gap, var(--gap, 0px)) / var(--items-per-row, 2)))}}.layout__item{container-type:inline-size;width:var(--layout-item-width, 100%);flex:var(--layout-item-flex, 1 1 var(--layout-item-flex-basis, auto));max-width:var(--layout-item-max-width, none);height:auto;display:flex}.layout__item>div{width:100%;display:flex;flex-flow:column;gap:var(--item-gap, 20px);gap:var(--item-gap, 1.25rem);flex-grow:1}@media(min-width: 47.5rem){.layout__item{--item-gap: 30px;--item-gap: 1.88rem}}.layout__item:nth-child(1).a__i--slide-in{animation-name:slide-in-left;opacity:0;transform:translateX(-100%)}.layout__item:nth-child(2).a__i--slide-in{animation-name:slide-in-right;opacity:0;transform:translateX(100%)}@keyframes slide-in-left{0%{transform:translateX(-100%);opacity:0}100%{transform:none;opacity:1}}@keyframes slide-in-right{0%{transform:translateX(100%);opacity:0}100%{transform:none;opacity:1}}.layout--2-cols-from-tablet .layout__item.a__i--slide-in,.layout--3-cols linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(255,245,203) 0%,rgb(182,227,212) 50%,rgb(51,167,181) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--electric-grass: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(202,248,128) 0%,rgb(113,206,126) 100%);--wp--preset--gradient--midnight: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(2,3,129) 0%,rgb(40,116,252) 100%);--wp--preset--font-size--small: 13px;--wp--preset--font-size--medium: 20px;--wp--preset--font-size--large: 36px;--wp--preset--font-size--x-large: 42px;--wp--preset--spacing--20: 0.44rem;--wp--preset--spacing--30: 0.67rem;--wp--preset--spacing--40: 1rem;--wp--preset--spacing--50: 1.5rem;--wp--preset--spacing--60: 2.25rem;--wp--preset--spacing--70: 3.38rem;--wp--preset--spacing--80: 5.06rem;--wp--preset--shadow--natural: 6px 6px 9px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);--wp--preset--shadow--deep: 12px 12px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);--wp--preset--shadow--sharp: 6px 6px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);--wp--preset--shadow--outlined: 6px 6px 0px -3px rgb(255, 255, 255), 6px 6px rgb(0, 0, 0);--wp--preset--shadow--crisp: 6px 6px 0px rgb(0, 0, 0);}:where(.is-layout-flex){gap: 0.5em;}:where(.is-layout-grid){gap: 0.5em;}body .is-layout-flex{display: flex;}.is-layout-flex{flex-wrap: wrap;align-items: center;}.is-layout-flex > :is(*, div){margin: 0;}body .is-layout-grid{display: grid;}.is-layout-grid > :is(*, div){margin: 0;}:where(.wp-block-columns.is-layout-flex){gap: 2em;}:where(.wp-block-columns.is-layout-grid){gap: 2em;}:where(.wp-block-post-template.is-layout-flex){gap: 1.25em;}:where(.wp-block-post-template.is-layout-grid){gap: 1.25em;}.has-black-color{color: var(--wp--preset--color--black) !important;}.has-cyan-bluish-gray-color{color: var(--wp--preset--color--cyan-bluish-gray) !important;}.has-white-color{color: var(--wp--preset--color--white) !important;}.has-pale-pink-color{color: var(--wp--preset--color--pale-pink)     <main class="main">
        <section id="icon-block_c257a56e74fe47d1ffe15e5cffd456c4" class="hero hero--default hero--has-image hero--image-right hero--side bg-color--white">
        <div class="container">
        <div class="hero__content hero__content--left">
            

<h2 class="wp-block-heading heading heading--display-1" id="h-subscription-bundling-starts-here">Subscription bundling starts here</h2>



<p class=" heading heading--3">To create subscription bundles for everyone, get started with the Digital Vending Machine®.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-content-justification-left is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-fdcfc74e wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<a href="https://bango.com/bundle-subscription-services/" class="btn accent--secondary-teal" data-wpel-link="internal"><span class="btn__text">Bundle</span></a>



<a href="https://bango.com/be-bundled" class="btn accent--secondary-pink" data-wpel-link="internal"><span class="btn__text">Be bundled</span></a>
</div>


        </div>
    </div>

    
                <div class="hero__media hero__media--contained hero__media--pos-middle">
                <picture><source media="(min-width: 1920px)" srcset="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25.png, https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25.png 2x"><source media="(min-width: 1600px)" srcset="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25-707x487.png, https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25.png 2x"><source media="(min-width: 1280px)" srcset="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25-435x300.png, https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25.png 2x"><source media="(min-width: 1024px)" srcset="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25-435x300.png, https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25.png 2x"><source media="(min-width: 760px)" srcset="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25.png, https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25.png 2x"><source media="(min-width: 600px)" srcset="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25-599x413.png, https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25.png 2x"><source media="(min-width: 420px)" srcset="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25-473x326.png, https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25.png 2x"><img width="322" height="222" src="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25-322x222.png" class="bg-image" alt="" data-object-fit="cover" srcset="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/DVM-33-full-25-644x444.png 2x" sizes="auto, " decoding="auto" loading="lazy" /></picture>            </div>
            </section>


<section class="section a section--no-spacing section--has-bg bg-color--secondary-teal section--default" id="icon-block_7141fc92937a588037246f215a02cab2">
    <div class="section__bg"></div>
    <div class="container">
        

<p class="has-text-align-center heading heading--3">The Digital Vending Machine® (DVM™) brings together subscription products with the world’s largest ecosystem for subscription bundling.</p>



<p class=" "></p>



<div class="wp-block-bango-developer-layout layout layout--match-heights">
<div class="wp-block-bango-developer-layout-item layout__item"><div>
<div class="card bg-color--white hover-bg-color--white card--icon">
        <div class="card__content card__content--alignment-default">
                        <span class="card__icon icon">
                    <svg>
                        <use href="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/box-icon-2-1.svg#content"></use>
                    </svg>
                </span>
                        <div>
            

<h2 class="wp-block-heading heading heading--3" id="h-find-and-choose-subscriptions">Find and choose subscriptions</h2>



<p class=" ">Bundle every type of subscription with your own products and services<br></p>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
</div></div>

                    </svg>
                </span>
                        <div>

    </div>
</section>

<section class="section a overflow-hidden section--default" id="icon-block_b46bf96b9eab9e364b8da1320decaf73">
    <div class="section__bg"></div>
    <div class="container">
        

<div class="wp-block-bango-developer-layout layout layout--none">
<div class="wp-block-bango-developer-layout-item layout__item"><div>
<div id="icon-block_a49133b6425029e15739f251ce88df30" class="container">
    <div class="slider slider--news js-slider">
        <div class="slider__header">
            

<h2 class="wp-block-heading heading heading--2" id="h-latest-blogs-amp-news">Latest blogs &amp; news</h2>


            <div class="slider__actions">
                <a href="/news/" class="btn accent--secondary-teal" data-wpel-link="internal">View more</a>
            </div>
        </div>
                <div class="slider__inner-wrap js-outer-wrap">
            <div class="slider__track js-track">
                                    <div class="slider__item js-track-item">
                        <div class="news-card news-card--home">
                        <div class="news-card__image">
                                                            <img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="1200" height="627" src="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Telco-pain-points_Blog.png" class="attachment-post-thumbnail size-post-thumbnail wp-post-image" alt="" srcset="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Telco-pain-points_Blog.png 1200w, https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Telco-pain-points_Blog-1198x626.png 1198w" sizes="(max-width: 1200px) 100vw, 1200px" />                                                    </div>
                        <div class="news-card__content">
                            <h3 class="heading heading--4"><a href="https://bango.com/the-race-telcos-are-losing-why-connectivity-alone-cant-sustain-your-future-revenue/" data-wpel-link="internal">The race telcos are losing: Why connectivity alone can’t sustain your future revenue</a></h3>
                        </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                                    <div class="slider__item js-track-item">
                        <div class="news-card news-card--home">
                        <div class="news-card__image">
                                                            <img decoding="async" width="1200" height="627" src="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Multi-party-blog-Feb-26-Blog.png" class="attachment-post-thumbnail size-post-thumbnail wp-post-image" alt="" srcset="https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Multi-party-blog-Feb-26-Blog.png 1200w, https://bango.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Multi-party-blog-Feb-26-Blog-1198x626.png 1198w" sizes="(max-width: 1200px) 100vw, 1200px" />                                                    </div>
                        <div class="news-card__content">
                            <h3 class="heading heading--4"><a href="https://bango.com/multi-party-subscription-bundling-is-now-the-default-strategy/" data-wpel-link="internal">Multi-party subscription bundling is now the default strategy. This is what it takes to make it work.</a></h3>
                        </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                                    <div class="slider__item js-track-item">
                        <div class="news-card news-card--home">
                        <div class="news-card__image">

                        <div class="news-card__content">

                        </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
</div></div>

        <script data-cfasync="false">
  document.onreadystatechange = function () {
    if (document.readyState == "complete") {
      var logout_link = document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="wp-login.php?action=logout"]');
      if (logout_link) {
        for(var i=0; i < logout_link.length; i++) {
          logout_link[i].addEventListener( "click", function() {
            Intercom('shutdown');
          });
        }
      }
    }
  };
</script>

  window.intercomSettings = {"app_id":"t7vahu7d","installation_type":"wordpress","installation_version":"3.0.2"};
</script>
<script data-cfasync="false">(function(){var w=window;var ic=w.Intercom;if(typeof ic==="function"){ic('reattach_activator');ic('update',w.intercomSettings);}else{var d=document;var i=function(){i.c(arguments);};i.q=[];i.c=function(args){i.q.push(args);};w.Intercom=i;var l=function(){var s=d.createElement('script');s.type='text/javascript';s.async=true;s.src='https://widget.intercom.io/widget/t7vahu7d';var x=d.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];x.parentNode.insertBefore(s, x);};if(document.readyState==='complete'){l();}else if(w.attachEvent){w.attachEvent('onload',l);}else{w.addEventListener('load',l,false);}}})()</script></body>
